'''ât-d-s-y''' ('''katadseyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alchemise|alchemise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alchemise|alchemise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-d-s-y
|-
! Lemma
| katadseyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitadseyoko|thitadseyoko]] || [[word:jitadseyoko|jitadseyoko]] || [[word:shitadseyoko|shitadseyoko]] || [[word:kitadseyoko|kitadseyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutadseyoko|thuthutadseyoko]] || [[word:jujutadseyoko|jujutadseyoko]] || [[word:shushutadseyoko|shushutadseyoko]] || [[word:kukutadseyoko|kukutadseyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutadseyoko|thutadseyoko]] || [[word:jutadseyoko|jutadseyoko]] || [[word:shutadseyoko|shutadseyoko]] || [[word:kutadseyoko|kutadseyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetadseyoko|thetadseyoko]] || [[word:jetadseyoko|jetadseyoko]] || [[word:shetadseyoko|shetadseyoko]] || [[word:ketadseyoko|ketadseyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotadseyoko|thothotadseyoko]] || [[word:jojotadseyoko|jojotadseyoko]] || [[word:shoshotadseyoko|shoshotadseyoko]] || [[word:kokotadseyoko|kokotadseyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotadseyoko|thotadseyoko]] || [[word:jotadseyoko|jotadseyoko]] || [[word:shotadseyoko|shotadseyoko]] || [[word:kotadseyoko|kotadseyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotadseyoko|thotadseyoko]] || [[word:jotadseyoko|jotadseyoko]] || [[word:shotadseyoko|shotadseyoko]] || [[word:kotadseyoko|kotadseyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚtadseyoko|thĂŚtadseyoko]] || [[word:jĂŚtadseyoko|jĂŚtadseyoko]] || [[word:shĂŚtadseyoko|shĂŚtadseyoko]] || [[word:kĂŚtadseyoko|kĂŚtadseyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatadseyoko|thathatadseyoko]] || [[word:jajatadseyoko|jajatadseyoko]] || [[word:shashatadseyoko|shashatadseyoko]] || [[word:kakatadseyoko|kakatadseyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatadseyoko|thatadseyoko]] || [[word:jatadseyoko|jatadseyoko]] || [[word:shatadseyoko|shatadseyoko]] || [[word:katadseyoko|katadseyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatadseyoko|thatadseyoko]] || [[word:jatadseyoko|jatadseyoko]] || [[word:shatadseyoko|shatadseyoko]] || [[word:katadseyoko|katadseyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
